status: Enum (Pending, Processed, Rejected, Awaiting Payment, Expired)

totalAmount: Number, type: Enum (violation, repair, prepaid)
amount: Number, status: Enum (Pending, Success, Failed)
status: Enum (Pending, Approved, InvoiceReleased, Paid, Rejected, Completed)
status: Enum (Pending, Processing, Done, Unpaid, Paid)
category: Enum (Tiếng ồn, Vệ sinh, An ninh...)
